title: phacelia lyallii
intro: Phacelia lyallii, also known as New Zealand phacelia or toro toro, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phacelia lyallii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phacelia lyallii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
